text:
There once was a young girl named Holly. She lived alone because her folks died when she was really little. She liked spiders a lot. One day she found this gigantic tar gooey spider outside her window. She watched it every day.

One night she dreamed it climbed up her bed and hugged her tight. She woke up and giggled. Soon it happened. She noticed it had spun a web. She liked it.

She brushed it. It felt like feathers. She swiped at her cheeks. She got scared but waved her hand. It didn't come. She pulled feathers from her head. Maybe it saw that.

One morning she waved her paw quietly. It didn't go away. She danced around. It jumped! It followed her.

She ran! It crawled! She jumped! It spun!

One day she couldn't find it anymore. She saw a book. Inside was an owl.

Holly opened the door.

The owl liked her. He clucked. He clucked
